channel.title: Striped Cotton on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen
channel.description: Recent content in Striped Cotton on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen

item.title: Wholesale Striped Cotton Shirt | Saturn Embroidered Detachable Hooded Top
item.description: A statement shirt that blurs the line between tailored shirt and casual jacket. Made from lightweight, color-woven striped cotton with excellent drape and breathability. The design includes a detachable hood and is distinguished by a custom ‘Saturn’ planet embroidery on the placket, finished with contrasting purple tie closures.
